_comment: BACKEND service config. Railway resolves this file relative to a service's
Root Directory, so this one applies to the service whose root is '/' — the
backend, which needs the repo root as build context (its Dockerfile COPYs
The FRONTEND has its own apps/dashboard/frontend/railway.json. That is not
duplication: without it, Railway falls back to THIS file and builds the
backend's Dockerfile for the frontend service, which fails on
a distinct root needs its own config.
